_comment: ExpertSwarm adapter manifest. Each entry maps an expert name to its adapter path and expected SHA-256 hash. The hash covers the entire adapter directory contents. Run scripts/hash_adapter.py to generate hashes for new adapters.

base.description: phi-2 base model, no adapter — general purpose chat and Q&A.

coder.description: Code generation and debugging specialist (Python, JS, SQL).

analyst.description: Data analysis, summarisation, and structured reasoning.

writer.description: Long-form writing, editing, and creative tasks.
